headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Expedia Group (EXPE) Hiring Snap Veteran Derek Andersen As CFO
summary: Expedia Group has appointed Derek Andersen, former Snap Inc. CFO and longtime Amazon finance leader, as its new Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Scott Schenkel, who is leaving after supporting margin expansion and strengthening the company’s financial foundation. Andersen’s background in finance leadership across social media, streaming, ecommerce, and digital media platforms introduces a tech-centric perspective to Expedia’s global finance organization under CEO Ariane Gorin. We’ll now...
